about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: REMIELECTRIC - Your Reliable Partner
about.description: With years of experience in electrical installations, we provide professional services for residential and commercial properties. Our team of experts is here to solve all your electrical needs quickly and efficiently.
about.description2: We take pride in our meticulous approach, adherence to deadlines, and application of the latest safety standards. Whether it's a simple socket replacement or installing a complete system, we approach every job with the same level of dedication.

list.text: Exceptionally professional service! Daniel came quickly, diagnosed the problem with the distribution board and fixed everything perfectly. I recommend to everyone!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our services

list.question: Which areas do you cover?
list.answer: We cover Novi Sad and surrounding areas (Petrovaradin, Sremska Kamenica, Futog, Veternik). For more distant locations, contact us for arrangements.

list.question: How much does an estimate cost?
list.answer: The estimate is completely free and without obligation. We come to the site, examine the situation and give you an exact price before starting the work.

list.question: How long does electrical installation take?
list.answer: It depends on the scope of work. Minor interventions (outlet, switch replacement) take 1-2 hours. Complete installations for an apartment can take 3-7 days, depending on the square footage.

list.question: What is the cost of installing a distribution board?
list.answer: The price depends on the size of the property and the number of circuit breakers. The approximate price for a 50-70m² apartment is 15,000-25,000 RSD with materials. We provide the exact price after inspection.

list.question: Can I get an invoice?
list.answer: Yes, we issue fiscal receipts or invoices for all performed work. For legal entities, we obligatorily issue an invoice with all necessary details.
